Package com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck

Class CollectionCheck<T>

java.lang.Object
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<CollectionCheck<T>,Collection<T>>
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.CollectionCheck<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the element type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<CollectionCheck<T>,Collection<T>>
public final class CollectionCheck<T> extends AbstractCheck<CollectionCheck<T>,Collection<T>>
Fluent assertions for Collection values.
